race.comment: GAYLORD (1) is poised to win after placing at his last three outings, most recently when second over 1106m at Port Macquarie when he was in the firing line all the way. Rock-hard fit now and can land the blow. FRED'S MEMORY (10) is a last-start winner over 1190m at this track, showing good early speed on the occasion and leading throughout to score in tough conditions. Deserves following up. ENNIROC (3) was much better last start when closing off nicely into third at Inverell. Gets in well with the claim and only needs to hold his form to be right there at the business end. RENTESSIS (2) failed to meet market expectations when resuming at Coffs Harbour in his first run for the new stable. Kept fresh and is one to keep safe. THE LUPERCAL (7) has shown good early speed in his last two. Suspect they look to do the same.
